summary: An excerpt of VP JD Vance's White House press-briefing remarks on Iran ('Iran cannot have a nuclear weapon'), with a red headline card, burned-in captions, and a 'TEXT VP TO 45470' lower-third. A static talking-head shot with no music or B-roll.
notable_text: VP JD Vance On Iran Negotiations, "Iran Cannot Have a Nuclear Weapon"; TEXT "VP" TO 45470 FOR UPDATES FROM THE WHITE HOUSE; THE WHITE HOUSE
